rulesStrings.li: crossed_origin->The first confirmed Marked Virus cluster began as a blood-screening anomaly in a frontier hospital. Within four days the hospital staff were armed, organized, and hunting survivors by name.
crossed_military_report->Military Report 17: Do not classify infected as undead. Subjects retain door use, weapon use, ambush planning, and speech. Treat every infected human as an armed combatant.
crossed_survivor_journal->Survivor Journal: The worst part was the laughing. They remembered the hallways. They remembered the locks. They remembered us.
crossed_audio_log->Audio Log C-44: Marked rash is most visible around the eyes and cheeks. Advanced cases show a dark red X pattern across the face, neck, and upper torso.
crossed_progression->Medical Note: Most confirmed victims resolve quickly. A terminal case usually becomes one of the Marked Men or dies from viral collapse; rare slow infections remain lucid longer.
crossed_timeline->Planetary Timeline: Exposure. Rapid onset. Psychosis. Death reanimation. Transformation. Organized raids. Settlement collapse. Alpha migration.
